title: najas tenuifolia subsp. pseudograminea
intro: Najas tenuifolia subsp. pseudograminea, also known as water wort or narrow-leaf naiad, is a plant species that belongs to the Najadaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin problems. Najas tenuifolia subsp. pseudograminea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its herbal applications, with recommended dosages varying depending on the specific health condition being addressed.
